title: Mixed-Precision Federated Aggregation

title: Carbon-Aware Scheduling Tradeoffs
scenario: Your 2,000-GPU cluster in Texas runs flexible offline RLHF training. The grid's carbon intensity fluctuates daily from 200g CO2/kWh (high wind/solar) to 600g CO2/kWh (gas/coal peaks). The sustainability team proposes pausing all training for 6 hours daily during peak carbon hours to meet ESG goals.

title: Overprovisioning Under Power Caps
scenario: You are designing a new cluster with a hard 10 MW facility limit.
